remarks: Welcome to 11 Twin Circle Drive, tucked within one of Westport's most quietly connected neighborhoods. Set on a private association of just two cul-de-sacs, the setting has the kind of easy, unhurried energy that's increasingly hard to find. A place where the street itself feels like an amenity, all just minutes from town, schools, trains, beaches, and everyday conveniences. The home balances comfortable everyday living with easy entertaining. A vaulted main living area with fireplace and hardwood floors connects naturally to the kitchen, complete with custom cabinetry, granite counters, stainless appliances, and a large center island. Just off the kitchen, a covered and screened porch becomes a natural extension of the home through the warmer months, the kind of space where summer dinners tend to stretch well into the evening. Multiple gathering spaces throughout the home offer flexibility for media, fitness, office, or guest use, while the bedroom layout provides both separation and functionality. Outside, expansive lawn space, mature trees, and a fenced pool area create a setting that feels private without sacrificing convenience.
